source.notes: DB57M012 — 57mm BLDC, 12V winding, 5 pole pairs (10 poles). R=0.12 Ohm/phase (star), L=0.15 mH/phase. Ke=0.028 Vs/rad (KV≈320 RPM/V). Base speed at no load ≈2363 RPM; rated speed 3500 RPM requires field weakening. tau_e = L/R = 1.25 ms giving stable dt=100 µs simulation. Parameters represent a low-resistance 12V winding optimised for high-current operation at 12V DC.
